description_long: This is an adult woman with shoulder-length, wavy hair, standing with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a belted, knee-length trench coat over cropped leggings, and wears high-heeled sandals. The coat features a double-breasted design with a visible collar and lapels, and the leggings end just below the knee. Her facial features are well-defined, and her posture is upright and balanced. The overall appearance suggests a fashionable, urban pedestrian ready for city environments.
description: A fashionable adult woman in a belted trench coat, cropped leggings, and high-heeled sandals, standing upright with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, trench coat details, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hair volume, and the layered look of the coat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, hair length, and the alignment of the legs and heels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, hair flow, and the silhouette of the coat and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: belted trench coat over cropped leggings with high-heeled sandals
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
